message:
fix: Test manifest fields and vector search error propagation

1. pages/verify.rs test fixes:
   - Add required version and generated_at fields to IntegrityManifest
   - Use fully qualified crate::pages::bundle::IntegrityEntry path
   - Ensures tests compile with complete manifest structure

2. search/vector_index.rs error handling:
   - Propagate dot_product_at errors via ? operator
   - Return Result<Vec<Vec<ScoredEntry>>> from parallel chunks
   - Removes swallowed errors that could mask issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
